nasb.text: and to govern the day and the night, and to separate the light from the darkness; and God saw that it was good.

esv.text: to rule over the day and over the night, and to separate the light from the darkness. And God saw that it was good.

cnv.text: 管晝夜，分光暗。　神看這是好的。

ccb.text: 管理昼夜，分开明暗。上帝看了，感到满意。

csbs.text: 分管昼与夜，并分开光与黑暗。神看这是好的。
